notes.note: A natural language name identifying the structure definition. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.
A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the structure definition.
The name of the organization or individual responsible for the release and ongoing maintenance of the structure definition.
The name of an individual to contact.
The name of an individual to contact.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Identifikator for pasienten. Bør være fødselsnummer (FNR) eller D-nummer (DNR) når tilgjengelig.
trans-unit.target: Patient identifier. Should be national identity number (FNR) or D-number (DNR) when available.

trans-unit.source: Encoded value for urban district. Code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403)
trans-unit.target: Encoded value for urban district. Code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403)

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Encoded value for urban district. Codes from code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403) shall be used.
trans-unit.target: Encoded value for urban district. Codes from code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403) shall be used.

trans-unit.source: Adressetype begrenset til home, temp eller old
trans-unit.target: Address type limited to home, temp, or old

notes.note: Describes the intended use of this particular set of codes.

trans-unit.source: Tillatte verdier er home, temp eller old
trans-unit.target: Allowed values are home, temp, or old

trans-unit.source: Kodet verdi for kommune. Kodeverk "Kommunenummer og regionale spesialkoder" (OID 3402)
trans-unit.target: Encoded municipality value. Code system "Municipality numbers and regional special codes" (OID 3402)

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. trans-unit.source: Kodet verdi for kommune. Koder fra kodeverk "Kommunenummer og regionale spesialkoder" (OID 3402) skal benyttes
trans-unit.target: Encoded municipality value. Codes from the code system "Municipality numbers and regional special codes" (OID 3402) shall be used.
